name: xiaohongshu
description: Xiaohongshu search, detail, comments, profile, user notes/collections/liked, explore feed, hot search, related notes, like, bookmark, follow, comment — Vue SSR extraction + API interception via L3 adapter. Write ops (like, bookmark, follow, comment) require login.

dependencies.searchNotes → getNoteDetail: searchNotes returns noteId and xsecToken used by getNoteDetail
dependencies.searchNotes → getNoteComments: searchNotes returns noteId and xsecToken used by getNoteComments
dependencies.searchNotes → getRelatedNotes: searchNotes returns noteId and xsecToken used by getRelatedNotes
dependencies.searchNotes → getUserProfile: searchNotes returns userId used by getUserProfile
dependencies.searchNotes → getUserNotes: searchNotes returns userId used by getUserNotes
dependencies.searchNotes → getUserCollections: searchNotes returns userId used by getUserCollections
dependencies.searchNotes → getUserLiked: searchNotes returns userId used by getUserLiked
dependencies.searchNotes → likeNote: searchNotes returns noteId and xsecToken used by likeNote
dependencies.searchNotes → bookmarkNote: searchNotes returns noteId and xsecToken used by bookmarkNote
dependencies.searchNotes → commentNote: searchNotes returns noteId and xsecToken used by commentNote
dependencies.searchNotes → followUser: searchNotes returns userId used by followUser
